page: Microsoft Azure B2ts_v2 is a burstable virtual machine belonging to the Bsv2 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz. The instance features 2 vCPUs mapped to 1 physical core with hyper-threading enabled, providing 2 threads per core. It is configured with 1.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 0.5 GB per core. The server does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Due to its burstable CPU allocation and highly constrained memory capacity, the B2ts_v2 exhibits limited performance profiles in benchmark testing. While its stress-ng single-core CPU performance is rated as average with a score of 1890.49, its multi-core CPU performance drops to a poor rating at 1932.88. Memory bandwidth is also highly constrained, with large block read-only speeds at 13.88 GB/sec and write speeds at 0.97 GB/sec. Passmark CPU and memory benchmarks reflect weak to poor performance, including a database operations score of 0.0 and a Redis SET throughput of 2.02 million operations per second.

The B2ts_v2 represents a highly budget-conscious tier, trading raw performance and memory capacity for qualitative cost efficiency. The burstable CPU model allows the instance to handle brief spikes in demand while maintaining a low baseline resource footprint. Given the 1.0 GB memory limitation and poor multi-core scaling, this instance is unsuitable for database hosting, heavy multi-threaded applications, or memory-intensive tasks. It is best suited for lightweight, non-critical workloads such as basic static web serving, minor background scripting, or low-traffic development and testing environments.
description: Microsoft Azure B2ts_v2 is a burstable, budget-oriented virtual machine from the Bsv2 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. Featuring 2 vCPUs across 1 physical core and 1.0 GB of system memory, this x86_64 instance is designed for light workloads. It lacks local storage and integrated GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmark data indicates average single-core CPU performance, but multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are poor, with a large block write speed of 0.97 GB/sec and a Redis SET throughput of 2.02 million operations per second. This server offers qualitative cost efficiency for low-resource applications. It is best suited for minor background tasks, low-traffic static web serving, and lightweight development environments where resource demands are minimal and burstable CPU allocation is sufficient.
og_description: Microsoft Azure B2ts_v2 is a burstable x86_64 virtual machine featuring an Intel Xeon 8370C processor, 2 vCPUs, and 1.0 GB of RAM, designed for low-resource, budget-conscious workloads.

tagline: A burstable, budget-friendly virtual machine with minimal memory footprint, designed for lightweight background tasks and low-traffic development environments.
